Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RAIN STOGDEN'S Motion to Tax Costs. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. CRC section 3.1700 provides service and filing of a memorandum of costs within fifteen days after the date of mailing of the notice of entry of judgment or dismissal by the clerk. Costs are awarded.
